arts.ttl: Arsenal confirm Gabriel Jesus injury diagnosis
arts.sum: Arsenal confirm Gabriel Jesus has suffered an ACL injury.

arts.ttl: Report: Randal Kolo Muani has now finally decided whether he will join Tottenham or Juventus on loan
arts.sum: 🚨BREAKING: Randal Kolo Muani has decided his next move 🛫

arts.ttl: Spanish press warn Arsenal not to make the same mistake as Liverpool in move for Martin Zubimendi
arts.sum: Only six months after Liverpool failed to conclude a deal for Martin Zubimendi, Arsenal are now said to have agreed a deal to sign the...

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou reveals 'vile, detestable' abuse from Tamworth fans during FA Cup clash
arts.sum: Tottenham boss Ange Postecoglou claimed an "unacceptable" minority of non-League Tamworth supporters crossed the line with their behaviour during FA Cup third round clash

arts.ttl: Why Liverpool should have no regrets about Zubimendi’s Arsenal transfer
arts.sum: Liverpool fans will likely have been frustrated by the news of Martin Zubimendi’s impending summer transfer to Arsenal when it broke on Tuesday. The Spain international is another one to add to the list of targets the Reds have missed out on in recent years; Kylian Mbappé, Jude Bellingham, Aurelien Tchouameni, Kvicha Kvaratskhelia, Moises Caicedo, […] The post Why Liverpool should have no regrets about Zubimendi’s Arsenal transfer first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Arsenal confident of Zubimendi deal in summer and confirm Jesus ACL injury
arts.sum: Talks for €60m Real Sociedad midfielder have progressed Arteta wants new striker with Jesus set for surgery Arsenal are confident of agreeing a deal to sign Martín Zubimendi in the summer and will step up attempts to bring in a striker this month after confirming Gabriel Jesus has sustained an anterior cruciate ligament injury that will rule him out until next season. Talks over Zubimendi, who turned down a move to Liverpool last year and opted to remain at Real Sociedad, are understood to have progressed in recent days, with the Spain midfielder thought to be keen to join. The 25-year-old, part of the Spain squad that won Euro 2024, has a €60m (£51m) release clause that will have to be met. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Sources: Spurs make first offer for Kolo Muani
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain have received a first offer from Tottenham for their France forward Randal Kolo Muani, sources have told ESPN.

arts.ttl: Arsenal outcast 'is in talks to join European giants' - with the Gunners 'open to a loan deal with an obligation to buy'
arts.sum: The Gunners are looking to revamp their squad, with Mail Sport revealing earlier today that Real Sociedad midfielder Martin Zubimendi is set to join the club this summer.

arts.ttl: Gabriel Jesus set to miss rest of season after Arsenal confirm ACL diagnosis
arts.sum: The Brazilian is likely to miss the rest of the current campaign – and possibly some of next season as well.

arts.ttl: Arsenal's Jesus to undergo surgery after ACL injury
arts.sum: Arsenal forward Gabriel Jesus will undergo surgery after sustaining an anterior cruciate ligament injury.
